steps.title: Set up the constraint
steps.content:
Each pull delivers 5-11 liters. If the elephant pulls $n$ times, the total is between $5n$ and $11n$ liters. For 198 liters:
$$5n \le 198 \le 11n$$
Which choice for $n$ satisfies this constraint?

steps.title: Backsolve with the answer choices
steps.content:
Backsolving - testing choice B (17):
${5}(17) = 85$ and ${11}(17) = 187$. Is $85 \le 198 \le 187$? No, because $198 \gt 187$.

Fails. Testing choice C (37):
${5}(37) = 185$ and ${11}(37) = 407$. Is $185 \le 198 \le 407$? Yes!

That confirms C is correct.
